evidence_bundle.text: Audit note: the standard expired and no current replacement was available.
evidence_bundle.title: Document Validity Review

rationale: Expired core policy evidence cannot support a reliable fulfilled conclusion.

requirement.text: The organization shall maintain current and approved incident response documentation, assign roles and reporting channels, define escalation including supplier or third-party incidents, test the process periodically, retain recent exercise evidence, perform post-incident review or lessons learned activities, and maintain document version validity.
requirement.title: Evidence-grounded incident response management
